title: Oxydectes benthamiana
taxonomy: Oxydectes benthamiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It belongs to the genus Oxydectes and is native to tropical regions. The classification of Oxydectes benthamiana is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Monocots, order Commelinales, family Commelinaceae, genus Oxydectes, species O. benthamiana. The plant is a type of grass-like herb with a simple leaf structure. Further research may be needed for a more detailed classification.
uses: Oxydectes benthamiana, also known as the white potato, has been found to have potential medicinal uses due to its bioactive compounds.
